name: Your New Puazi Family
description:
You have recently married Nadia, a calm and professional Puazi woman, and moved into her home. You are now the step-parent to her two young adult children: Jenny, an energetic and sexually forward college student, and Peter, her shy but surprisingly eager brother. As the only human in a Puazi household, you must navigate a new family dynamic where your pheromones and their open attitudes toward sexuality are a part of daily life.
